title: Apple touch icon for MaxControLADM administrative portal. A professional, high-fidelity version of the app symbol (minimalist geometric 'M' or 'X') on a solid, full-bleed teal and navy gradient background. The symbol should have a subtle drop shadow for depth. No rounded corners or framing shapes in the image itself. Clean, modern, and enterprise-grade aesthetic.
